## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)

- `[21:00]` **Allotera Therapeutics（前身为 Wugen）完成 3500 万美元融资，以推进针对 T 细胞癌症的现成 CAR-T 疗法**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Allotera Therapeutics (Formerly Wugen) Closes $35 Million Financing to Advance Off-the-Shelf CAR-T Therapies for T-Cell Cancers* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **🏛️监管 | Porton Advanced 用于外泌体制造的 UC-MSC 细胞库获得美国 FDA 药物主文件 (DMF) 认可**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Porton Advanced's UC-MSCs Cell Bank for Exosome Manufacturing Receives U.S. FDA Drug Master File (DMF) Acceptance* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **长寿蛋白竞赛已进入生产阶段：One Microcap 刚刚完成了其抗衰老 Klotho 疗法的 GMP 主细胞库**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *The Longevity Protein Race Reaches Manufacturing: One Microcap Just Completed A GMP Master Cell Bank For Its Anti-Aging Klotho Therapy* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:00]` **RoslinCT 和 BlueRock Therapeutics 合作，为细胞疗法开发商扩大临床级多能细胞系的使用范围**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *RoslinCT and BlueRock Therapeutics Partner to Expand Access to Clinical-Grade Pluripotent Cell Lines for Cell Therapy Developers* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[15:00]` **Genespire 和 SR-TIGET 显示肝脏定向基因治疗对甲基丙二酸血症的持久临床前疗效**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Genespire and SR-TIGET Show Durable Preclinical Efficacy of Liver-Directed Gene Therapy for Methylmalonic Acidemia* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)</small>
